stemHtml: List the constituent parts of the blood and state their function.

options.a: Red cells are involved in immunity, white cells carry oxygen and platelets coagulate blood.
options.b: Red cells carry oxygen, white cells are involved in immunity and platelets coagulate blood.
options.c: Red cells coagulate blood, white cells are involved in immunity, and platelets carry oxygen.
options.d: Red cells carry oxygen, white cells coagulate blood and platelets are involved in immunity.
